title: Colorful Bundles
description: Add colorful bundles to your game!
body:
![Bundle colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90391f96f4067f6274ee0d77cdb7af20cd6bd4f4_0.webp)
## This resource pack is made for people using **Bundles** in their game, thanks to packs like the [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/crafting-tweaks/) one!




Just use the anvil to **rename** a bundle with this format :
```
*Color* Bundle 
```
And the item will change to this color!



**(Needs [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or Optifine to work!)**
